name: brain-memory
description: A brain-inspired hierarchical memory system for AI coding agents. Deep nested file structure that mimics human memory with time-decay and strength-based recall.

scripts.test: node --test test/index-manager.test.js test/scorer.test.js test/tfidf.test.js test/recall.test.js test/recall-cli.test.js test/forget.test.js test/functional.test.js test/erasure.test.js test/stress.test.js test/crypto.test.js test/git-sync.test.js test/cloud-sync.test.js test/export-import.test.js test/install.test.js test/prompts.test.js test/session-start.test.js test/memorize.test.js test/pinning.test.js test/skills.test.js test/contradiction.test.js
scripts.test:integrations: npm run test:integrations:openclaw && npm run test:integrations:copilot && npm run test:integrations:kilo && npm run test:integrations:hermes
scripts.release:beta: npm version prerelease --preid beta && npm publish --tag beta && npm dist-tag add brain-memory@$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") latest
